message:
Fix window selection, highlighting, and duplication issues

- Select current window (index 0) when Winby opens instead of next window
- Increase selection highlight visibility (40% opacity, 2.5px border)
- Fix window duplication between current/other spaces sections:
  - Background tabs have different CG vs AX window IDs
  - Normalize titles (strip terminal dimensions, handle ellipsis)
  - Match by normalized title to filter duplicates while keeping
    real other-space windows
- Preserve window list order while sidebar is visible (new sidebarVisible flag)
- Add debug logging for window enumeration troubleshooting
